requirements.title: Local checklist.md exists for this restaurant
Local checklist.json exists for this restaurant
Mission Control root + child task metadata mirrors checklist paths, requirements, evidence, and current stage
Desktop and mobile screenshots captured
Live site DOM/text scrape captured
Audit names concrete conversion, credibility, mobile, and factual gaps
Google Reviews opened in browser and sorted by Highest
requirements.notes: Captured in OpenClaw browser on Google Maps Reviews tab after selecting Highest rating.

requirements.title: 30 written reviews captured, or exact shortage/blocker documented
requirements.notes: 30 written Google reviews captured in JSON and MD packet.

requirements.title: Review themes summary is usable for copy and pitch docs
requirements.notes: Google Highest packet theme extraction written to google-reviews-themes.md and audit Inputs updated.

requirements.title: Exactly one archetype/template route is chosen and justified
requirements.notes: Mary's remains locked to bamzi-01 with routing rationale and source truth pack preserved locally.

requirements.title: Template fork builds successfully with real content and preserved conversion links
requirements.notes: npm run build passed after replacing network-fetched Google fonts with local CSS font variables for this sandbox.

requirements.title: No generic restaurant copy, fake claims, fake menu items, fake reviews, or fake ordering paths
requirements.notes: Preview content stays inside routing/source/audit/review evidence and labels unresolved phone/order issues truthfully.

requirements.title: Copy/visual rhythm feels specific to the restaurant and selected archetype
requirements.notes: Home-page copy and proof sections were tightened around Woodstock Square, tacos, tamales, mole, salsa, and service themes from the review packet.

requirements.title: Order/reserve/call/directions/catering/events paths are accurate as applicable
requirements.notes: Menu, DoorDash, call, and directions paths remain truthful, and the public phone conflict note stays visible instead of being hidden.

requirements.title: Mobile pass is explicitly checked with evidence
requirements.notes: The review carousel keeps a mobile-safe horizontal scroll lane with touch pause/resume and reduced-motion protection, documented in the improvement evidence file.

requirements.title: Top 3 concrete improvements are named from audit/preview/QA
requirements.notes: Ranked in top-3-improvements-2026-05-04.md with rationale tied to audit, review themes, and the current preview.

requirements.title: All three improvements are implemented
requirements.notes: Hero action rail, faster-scanning proof surfaces, and clearer order-phone planning updates are implemented in the preview code.

requirements.title: Each improvement has before/after evidence
requirements.notes: Before/after notes, diff evidence, and verification output are captured locally for each ranked improvement.

requirements.title: Concierge KB only uses verified restaurant facts
requirements.notes: Concierge prompt and fallback logic stay inside verified facts from the source pack, review themes, and current content file only.

requirements.title: Short transcript proves useful behavior
requirements.notes: Compiled API route was exercised directly with deterministic local fallback transcripts for menu suggestions, directions, DoorDash and call routing, and reservation refusal.

requirements.title: Fallbacks prevent fake reservations, unsupported promises, or invented facts
requirements.notes: The concierge refuses reservations and live availability promises, labels DoorDash as a public third-party path, and sends time-sensitive questions back to the restaurant phone.

requirements.title: Pitch is specific to restaurant, neighborhood/cuisine, reviews, and conversion gaps
requirements.notes: The pitch doc is tied directly to Mary's Mexican Grill, Woodstock Square, verified Google review themes, and the audited owned-site conversion failures.

requirements.title: Pitch explains before/after delta in owner language
requirements.notes: The pitch frames the current site as a setup-page leak and the preview as a menu-first, proof-backed, conversion repair in plain operator language.

requirements.title: Evidence and preview links are embedded or linked
requirements.notes: The pitch doc embeds or links the audit, review packet/themes, improvement evidence, top-three evidence, and concierge evidence that support the seller story.

requirements.title: Likely owner objections have concise answers
requirements.notes: The battle cards answer the main owner objections around existing Google/DoorDash demand, polish risk, casual-vs-fancy register, phone/hours uncertainty, photo readiness, and truthful order-path handling.

requirements.title: Demo path and proof points are clear
requirements.notes: The battle cards define an exact seller sequence across the homepage, content source, review proof, menu/contact flow, and audited before-state so the demo stays concrete.

requirements.title: Risks/unknowns are called out truthfully
requirements.notes: The battle cards explicitly limit claims around phone confirmation, hours, direct ordering, owner story, photography rights, and remote Mission Control sync.

requirements.title: QA round 1 completed with screenshots, findings, fixes, and MC writeback
requirements.notes: Round 1 local QA artifacts capture the mobile overflow findings, the responsive fixes applied in the bamzi-01 fork, the pre-fix screenshot/scrape evidence paths, and the blocked Mission Control writeback payloads.

requirements.title: QA round 2 completed with screenshots, findings, fixes, and MC writeback
requirements.notes: Round 2 local QA artifacts capture the mobile conversion polish fixes, the desktop sell-readiness copy blocker and rewrite, post-fix desktop/mobile screenshot recapture noted as passed, successful build/typecheck verification, and the blocked Mission Control writeback payloads.

requirements.title: QA round 3 completed with final sell-readiness screenshots, fixes, and MC writeback
Preview URL, screenshots, pitch doc, battle cards, checklist, QA evidence, and requirement status are mirrored to MC
No delivery until MC has checklist paths, preview/artifact URL, and required gate evidence

doneCriteria: Mission Control lead has a simple sales status and current metadata.build_stage.
Mission Control parent task metadata.requirements mirrors this checklist.
All required checklist rows are passed.
Three QA rounds are logged with screenshot evidence.
Preview URL, pitch doc, outreach draft, and delivery evidence are attached.
